strings.tag: Hi [name], this is a test string from room010 - number one fan's apartment.
How can I help you, officer?
Freebird is dead? That's horrible! How? When? Who?
Not personally, but I'm a HUGE fan. In fact, I saw her concert a few days ago - Holy smokes! I know who killed Freebird!
What? Well ... no, of course not. I just like her music. I'm no stalker!
Of course! I have nothing to hide! Take whatever you need!
She and her boyfriend got in this huge fight after the concert. Here, I even took a picture.
My computer? Well ... umm ... sure! I'll warn you, I've installed some personal security measures. I don't think you'll find anything.
Fingerprints?? Are you ... well ... I guess.
Shoes? I'm not wearing any at the moment, but I'm sure they're around here somewhere.
We're investigating the death of Freebird Reynolds.
Did you know Freebird Reynolds?
Did you ever e-mail Freebird Reynolds?
Can I look around your apartment?
You know who killed Freebird? Who?
I want to check your computer to be sure.
I'll need your fingerprints.
I want your shoes for evidence.
Thank you for your time.
What can I help you with?
We don't have a search warrant, so you must ask Mr. Tam's permission. Let's see if he's helpful.
First, ask him about it. Then we'll see if we can find any digital evidence on his computer.
I think there's more evidence here.
I think we're done here. Time to move on.
They are probably here somewhere. See if you can find them in this apartment.
We can't do anything here, but we'll run a thorough digital forensics investigation back in the lab.
Can I legally search this apartment?
How can I show Gabriel Tam is NO1FAN?
Are we finished here?
How can I collect Mr. Tam's shoes when he's not wearing any?
What should I do with Mr. Tam's computer?
I'll keep looking for more evidence.
Let's get out of here.
